code: import{S}from'../data/spots';function dist(a1,o1,a2,o2){const R=6371,da=(a2-a1)*Math.PI/180,doo=(o2-o1)*Math.PI/180;const a=Math.sin(da/2)**2+Math.cos(a1*Math.PI/180)*Math.cos(a2*Math.PI/180)*Math.sin(doo/2)**2;return R*2*Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a),Math.sqrt(1-a));}export function searchSpots(q){if(!q)return[];const l=q.toLowerCase();return S.map(s=>({...s,sc:(s.name.toLowerCase().includes(l)?2:0)+(s.country.toLowerCase().includes(l)?1:0)})).filter(s=>s.sc>0).sort((a,b)=>b.sc-a.sc).slice(0,6);}export function nearest(la,lo){return S.map(s=>({...s,d:dist(la,lo,s.lat,s.lng)})).sort((a,b)=>a.d-b.d).slice(0,6);}
